title: Lado Lakshmi Yojana for women #finsaheli #govtschemes
description:
How to apply 👇 Read Description 👇
Deen Dayal Lado Lakshmi Yojana : Empowering Women with ₹2,100/month! 

Applicable State : Haryana

How to apply?

Here’s a simplified step-by-step:
 1. Download the official “Lado Lakshmi” mobile app (available for Android & iOS). 
 2. Register by filling in your Aadhaar number, bank account details, residence proof, income certificate, etc. 
 3. Submit the application through the app — it goes for verification via the state’s digital system (e.g., the Parivar Pehchan Patra database) and once approved, you’ll start receiving the aid. 
 4. Ensure you have an active bank account in your name for receiving the DBT. 

✅ What is the scheme?
 • The Deen Dayal Lado Lakshmi Yojana (DDLLY) by the Government of Haryana supports women in the state to become financially independent and socially secure. 
 • Eligible women will receive ₹2,100 per month via Direct Benefit Transfer (DBT) into their bank account. 
 • The scheme took effect from 25 September 2025 across Haryana. 

👤 Who can apply?

To be eligible under DDLLY:
 • You must be a woman aged 23 years or above. 
 • You must come from a family whose verified annual income is ₹1 lakh or less. 
 • You (or your husband, if married into Haryana) should be a resident of Haryana and have been living the state for at least 15 years. 
 • There’s no cap on how many eligible women in a family can benefit (i.e., more than one woman from the same family can apply). 

Excluded applicants:
 • Women already receiving comparable financial-assistance under certain other schemes (e.g., old-age pension, widow & destitute allowance, etc.). 

🎯 Key Benefits & Highlights
 • Direct monthly assistance of ₹2,100 to eligible women, helping build economic security. 
 • Fully digital process — no need to visit offices (in many cases) thanks to the app-based application. 
 • Helps uplift women from economically weaker sections and supports gender equity in Haryana. 

#finsaheli  #WomenEmpowerment #GovernmentScheme #DDLLY #FinancialIndependence #BetiBachao #haryanagovtjobs
